# Breeze Roofing

> Breeze Roofing is a family-owned roofing contractor based in Wilmington, NC serving the Cape Fear coast. We specialize in IBHS Fortified Roof installations, residential and commercial roofing, storm damage repair, and 24/7 emergency service.

## Contact
- Phone: (910) 665-5277
- Email: Letsgo@breezeroofingnc.com
- Location: Wilmington, NC 28401
- Website: https://breezeroofingnc.com

## Service Areas
- Wilmington, NC (28401, 28403, 28405, 28409, 28411, 28412)
- Hampstead, NC (28443)
- Leland, NC (28451)
- Carolina Beach, NC (28428)
- Wrightsville Beach, NC (28480)
- Southport, NC (28461)
- Topsail Island, NC (28445, 28460)
- Surf City, NC (28445)

## Key Differentiators
- IBHS Fortified Roof Certified Contractor — saves homeowners 20-40% on insurance
- 24/7 Emergency Storm Response
- Family-owned — Brett answers the phone directly
- Free drone-assisted roof inspections
- Financing available through Momnt Financial
- Specializes in coastal NC — salt air, hurricane-grade installations

## Certifications
- NC Licensed & Insured
- IBHS Fortified Roof Certified

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does a roof replacement cost in Wilmington NC?
A: A typical residential roof replacement in Wilmington costs between $8,000 and $20,000 depending on roof size, materials, and complexity. Coastal homes may cost more due to hurricane-rated installation requirements.

Q: What is an IBHS Fortified Roof and can it lower my insurance?
A: An IBHS Fortified Roof is a certification from the Insurance Institute for Business & Home Safety confirming your roof was built to hurricane-resistant standards. In NC, this designation can qualify homeowners for insurance premium discounts of 20-40% depending on your insurer.

Q: Do you offer free estimates?
A: Yes. Use our Instant Estimator online for a quick ballpark, or call (910) 665-5277 to schedule a free in-person inspection.

Q: Are you licensed and insured in NC?
A: Yes. Breeze Roofing is NC licensed, carries general liability insurance, and maintains workers' compensation coverage for all crew members.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: We serve Wilmington, Hampstead, Leland, Carolina Beach, Wrightsville Beach, Southport, Topsail Island, Surf City, and a 50-mile radius around Wilmington, NC.

Q: Do you offer financing?
A: Yes. We offer flexible financing through Momnt Financial with terms up to 12 years, competitive rates, and no prepayment penalties. Pre-qualify without affecting your credit score.
